name: Miya Biwi Aur Murder
overview: Miya aur Biwi, Priya and Jayesh are struggling in a dysfunctional marriage of 7 years. 1 night, over the course of 7 hours, they will have to work together to stay alive. Can they do it? Or do they fall victim to the madness of the night.

trailers.title: Miya Biwi Aur Murder | Official Trailer | Rajeev Khandelwal | Manjari Fadnnis | MX Player
